name: tokenkrush
description: Marketplace for the tokenkrush skill — compresses agent instruction markdown files (CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, SOUL.md, memory files).

plugins.name: tokenkrush
plugins.description: Compresses agent instruction markdown files. Measured ~39% token reduction across Claude, GPT-5, and Gemini tokenizers, with zero directive loss. Especially useful for Claude Opus 4.7 users — cancels the ~43% tokenizer bloat over Sonnet.
